## Inputs


<div class="x2mdx-ref-panel">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-panel-head">
    <h3>TrafficControlStateRequest</h3>
    
  </div>
  
  
  
<dl class="x2mdx-ref-meta-grid">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">
    <dt>Message</dt>
    <dd>com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.TrafficControlStateRequest</dd>
  </div>

    <dt>Client stream</dt>
    <dd>No</dd>

</dl>

  
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">members</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Members for which to retrieve the traffic state</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">exact_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint64</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Provide an exact timestamp at which traffic states must be returned</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">relative_timestamp</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">RelativeTimestamp</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">A relative timestamp based on the sequencer&#x27;s state at the time of the request, see above for details</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>

<div class="x2mdx-ref-panel">
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-panel-head">
    <h3>TrafficControlStateResponse</h3>
    
  </div>
  
  
  
<dl class="x2mdx-ref-meta-grid">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-meta-item">

<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">

    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">traffic_states</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated map</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The key is the serialized member value The value is their currently known traffic state (the traffic state contains a timestamp at which it is valid)</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
  
  
</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.sequencer.admin.v30.SequencerAdministrationService/TrafficControlState <<'EOF'
{
  "members": [
    "string"
  ],
  "exactTimestamp": "0"
}
EOF
```

</div>
  </div>
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">

  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">OK</span>
  
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-response-label">application/json</span>
  
</div>

```json OK
{
  "trafficStates": [
    {
      "key": {
        "extraTrafficPurchased": "0",
        "extraTrafficConsumed": "0",
        "baseTrafficRemainder": "0",
        "lastConsumedCost": "0",
        "timestamp": "0",
        "serial": 0
      }
    }
  ]
}
```
